CustomField.description: Set to true by NEPA_Close_Administrative_Record flow when a machine-readable administrative record manifest ContentVersion has been generated for this process. Prevents duplicate manifest generation on subsequent ROD/FONSI field changes. MFR 9 — Administrative Record Management.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Administrative record manifest has been generated and locked. The JSON manifest ContentVersion is available via the CEQExport API. Unlock only with NEPA Coordinator approval.
CustomField.label: AR Manifest Locked
